scripts.db:start: (brew services start postgresql@18 || brew services start postgresql)
scripts.db:stop: (brew services stop postgresql@18 || brew services stop postgresql)
scripts.db:setup: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; [ -f .env.local ] && . ./.env.local; [ -f apps/web/.env.local ] && . ./apps/web/.env.local; set +a; if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then pnpm db:apply; else pnpm db:init; fi'
scripts.db:apply: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; [ -f .env.local ] && . ./.env.local; [ -f apps/web/.env.local ] && . ./apps/web/.env.local; set +a; if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then echo DATABASE_URL is not set; exit 1; fi; (/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/bin/psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f apps/db/schema.sql || psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f apps/db/schema.sql)'
scripts.db:cleanup: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; [ -f .env.local ] && . ./.env.local; [ -f apps/web/.env.local ] && . ./apps/web/.env.local; set +a; if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then (/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/bin/psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f apps/db/cleanup.sql || psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f apps/db/cleanup.sql); else pnpm db:start && (/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/bin/psql -d link_shortener -f apps/db/cleanup.sql || psql -d link_shortener -f apps/db/cleanup.sql); fi'
scripts.db:init: pnpm db:start && pnpm db:create && (/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/bin/psql -d link_shortener -f apps/db/schema.sql || psql -d link_shortener -f apps/db/schema.sql)
scripts.db:reset: pnpm db:start && (/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/bin/psql -d postgres -c "SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = 'link_shortener' AND pid <> pg_backend_pid();" || psql -d postgres -c "SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = 'link_shortener' AND pid <> pg_backend_pid();") && (/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/bin/psql -d postgres -c 'DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS link_shortener;' || psql -d postgres -c 'DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS link_shortener;') && pnpm db:create && pnpm db:init
